workstream: Haiku-fleet persona panel — 10 parallel persona reviews of the persona workspace's effectiveness
description: Scale test of rally-workflows coordination with 10 concurrent Haiku-tier agents. Each task adopts one persona and reviews the persona workspace (schema, fixtures, UI components, persona-lab skill) answering: what would make this persona system more effective at producing useful, trustworthy synthetic-user feedback? Read-only review; each task writes exactly one result JSON in its own path. run_id: haiku-scale-20260609-01.

tasks.intent: Persona review as Morgan Lee (Operations skeptic, RevOps lead): audit the persona workspace for operational trustworthiness and auditability of persona-derived feedback
tasks.output: JSON: {task, persona, top_concern, findings[{severity, evidence, why_it_matters, suggested_change, confidence}], effectiveness_suggestions[], access_gaps[]}
